---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new probe, condition, analysis method, or framework improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What are you proposing?

A clear description of the feature.

## Category

- [ ] New probe
- [ ] New authority condition
- [ ] Analysis improvement
- [ ] Schema extension
- [ ] CLI improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## For new probes: Ethical invariance check

What is the ethical dimension being tested? Is it equally ethically significant regardless of authority level? (A request that's only wrong under one condition doesn't satisfy ethical invariance.)

## For new conditions: Milgram variable parameterization

What are the prestige / proximity / diffusion / escalation values? How does this condition extend the gradient?

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you considered and why you prefer this one.

## Are you willing to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I'll open a PR
- [ ] No, I'm requesting someone else to implement
